prompt: Overlay the fine weave texture onto the letters, letting threads show through.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the textual bicycle graphic, by applying the fine weave texture from image 2 onto all the letters. The texture should be clearly visible as if woven into the letters, showcasing the individual threads and providing a tactile, fabric-like appearance.
objects: Textured letters forming the bicycle graphic
Visible individual threads in the texture
Tactile, fabric-like appearance of the letters
Small black non-textual shapes (e.g., question marks)
